hero.subtitle: Transform a single content source into optimized posts for multiple social media platforms, using Generative AI to automate the creative process.

howItWorks.title: How It Works in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: CreatorHub's automation process saves you maximum time and effort.

step1.title: Connect Source
step1.description: Provide anything – an article URL, YouTube video, audio file, or just an idea.

step2.title: AI Generates Automatically
step2.description: CreatorHub analyzes the source and automatically creates a complete multimedia content suite for multiple platforms.

step3.title: Schedule & Publish
step3.description: Review, refine if needed, and schedule posts across all channels with just a few clicks.

testimonial.quote: CreatorHub has completely transformed how we do marketing. We save over 20 hours per week and our social media presence has never been better.

metric1.label: Hours saved per week
metric1.description: Automate repetitive tasks from ideation to publishing.

metric2.label: Content output
metric2.description: Create more content for more channels without extra effort.

metric3.label: Engagement growth
metric3.description: Maintain consistent presence across platforms to boost engagement.

HomePage.featureSubtitle: AI-powered tools that transform content into optimized posts for each platform

feature1.title: Multi-Source Input
feature1.description: Easily create content from articles, videos, audio, or text prompts.

feature2.title: Multi-Platform Content Generation
feature2.description: Automatically generate optimized content drafts for Instagram, TikTok, X, and LinkedIn from one source.

feature3.title: AI-Generated Media
feature3.description: Get complete posts with AI-generated captions, images, and videos tailored for each platform.

feature4.title: AI Chat Assistant
feature4.description: Refine your content with natural language commands like `make this more humorous` or `create another image`.

feature5.title: Smart Scheduling
feature5.description: Schedule posts across all platforms with intuitive calendar and automatic optimal time suggestions.

feature6.title: Publishing & Integration
feature6.description: Publish posts to social media platforms via API integration, manage posting status directly within the system.

HomePage.useCasesSubtitle: See how CreatorHub helps create content for multiple platforms from various sources.

card.title: Create Content from YouTube/TikTok Videos
description: Input a YouTube or TikTok video URL, AI automatically analyzes the content.
Generate optimized posts for each platform: X, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram.
Automatically extract key points and write platform-specific captions.

card.title: Convert Articles & Documents
description: Input a blog URL or upload PDF/Word files as content sources.
Create a series of in-depth LinkedIn posts from a single article.
Generate Instagram carousel slides from main points.

card.title: Create from Ideas
description: Start with just a text idea, AI develops it into video scripts.
Generate multiple content versions for 8 platforms simultaneously.
Use AI Chat to refine content with natural language commands.

card.title: AI Media Generation & Scheduling
description: Generate illustrations with Gemini AI in multiple sizes and resolutions.
Create videos from text descriptions using Veo 3.0 (Google AI).
Schedule posts automatically with built-in Calendar and direct publishing.

PricingPage.headerTitle: Choose the Plan That Fits Your Creativity
PricingPage.headerSubtitle: Whether you're just starting or a professional agency, CreatorHub has a plan designed just for you. Start free today!
PricingPage.creditSystemSubtitle: One flexible credit type for all your creative needs.

creditSystem.note: Applied when source is prompt/text and only generates caption.
Cost includes caption generation and 1 AI image.
Text-to-Video flow: Create a completely new short video from text (includes script, voiceover, video, caption).
Each project gets 3 free refine requests, subsequent requests will be charged.
Video-to-Video flow: Cost calculated per minute of original video duration you upload. Includes: transcription, auto find and insert B-rolls, add background music, logo and dynamic subtitles.

PricingPage.topUpSubtitle: You can easily purchase additional Credit packs to continue your work without upgrading your subscription immediately. Purchased credits never expire.

faqs.question: Do credits roll over to next month?
faqs.answer: Credits from monthly subscription plans will be refreshed each billing cycle and do not accumulate. Top-up credits purchased separately never expire.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my plan anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can cancel your plan anytime from the billing management page. You will still have access to paid features until the end of your billing cycle.

faqs.question: What's the difference between "Generate AI Video" and "Process Video"?
faqs.answer:
Generate AI Video (20 Credits/time): You only need to provide an idea (text), CreatorHub will write the script and create a completely new video for you.
Process Video (5 Credits/minute): You already have a video (self-recorded, interview...), CreatorHub will automatically add subtitles, insert illustrative scenes, and turn it into a professional clip.

header.title: Frequently Asked Questions
header.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CreatorHub

faqs.q: What exactly does your service do?
faqs.a: We help content creators optimize their social media presence by scheduling, scripting, and creating content on TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram. Our platform can:
list: Generate customized captions and hashtags for engagement.
Create short-form video drafts (ready for you to edit or post).
Schedule everything so you can maintain consistency without burnout.

steps: You tell us your niche, target audience, and preferred platforms.
Our AI and creative team create scripts, captions, and/or video drafts for you.
You review, approve, or request edits.
We help you schedule content to post at optimal times for engagement.
faqs.note: Think of it as having an automated content studio.

faqs.q: Who owns the content you create for me?
faqs.a: You do. 100%. Everything we create—scripts, captions, videos—belongs to you after delivery.

faqs.q: Can I edit scripts or videos?
faqs.a: Absolutely. You can edit scripts, captions, and video drafts directly on our platform before posting. We encourage customization so your unique voice shines through.

faqs.q: Do you offer a free trial?
faqs.a: Yes! We offer a 7-day free trial so you can test the workflow before committing.
Currently: TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels. We're expanding to LinkedIn and X (Twitter).

faqs.q: How do you ensure scripts and captions fit my style?
faqs.a: During onboarding, we'll ask about your tone, niche, and audience preferences. Our system then learns your style and creates drafts tailored to your voice. You can always provide feedback to refine results.
We can't guarantee specific follower or view numbers—social media algorithms are unpredictable. What we do guarantee is:
list: High-quality scripts and captions customized for engagement.
Streamlined workflow that saves you time.

faqs.a: Yes, all subscription plans are monthly. Cancel anytime with no hidden fees.
We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for the first paid plan if you're not satisfied.

faqs.q: What if I need human help?
faqs.a: We have a support team (real humans!) available via chat and email. For Pro and Agency plans, we also offer one-on-one onboarding calls.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.subtitle: Can't find the answer you need? Our support team is ready to help.
